use_codes.desc: USE OF GLUTAMINE TOGETHER WITH GROWTH HORMONE FOR THE TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH SHORT BOWEL SYNDROME

indications.text:
®
NutreStore [L-glutamine powder for oral solution] is indicated for the treatment of
Short Bowel Syndrome (SBS) in patients receiving specialized nutritional support when used in
conjunction with a recombinant human growth hormone that is approved for this indication
